mode.description: Analysis mode: 'grok' for named pattern analysis, 'regex' for custom regex, 'discover' for auto-detection.

file_path.description: Path to the log file to analyze.

pattern.description: GROK pattern name (e.g. 'IP', 'HTTPSTATUS') for grok mode, or regex with capture group for regex mode. Ignored in discover mode.

limit.description: Number of top results to return (grok/regex modes).

sample_lines.description: Number of lines to sample. Ignored if full_log is true.

full_log.description: If true, process the entire log file instead of sampling.

ai_analysis.description: If true and LLM is available, request AI interpretation of discovered patterns (discover mode only).
